title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 383.195 - Termination of plan, when
text:
383.195.  Termination of plan, when. — Termination of any plan created pursuant to the authority of sections 383.150 to 383.195 shall be by the director pursuant to a public hearing in which it is determined that medical malpractice liability insurance is reasonably available to health care providers in the voluntary market.
(L. 1976 H.B. 1309 § 10)
